step_by_step_reasoning: We start with the cow collars (UserConsumerIOT) which send data through two paths: WiFi to IoT Core and LoRa to EC2. Both ingestion paths pipe data into a Raw Kinesis Stream. A Lambda function processes this data (deduplicating and decoding to JSON) and sends it to a Processed Kinesis Stream. Kinesis Analytics (using Apache Flink) aggregates the stream and partitions it into S3. For the query path, the Farmer (UserConsumerFarmer) requests a heatmap from the mobile app, triggering an ECS Fargate container. The container runs an Athena query against the S3 data and retrieves the aggregated results.

graph.name: Halter IoT Cattle Tracking and Pasture Management Architecture
graph.notes: IoT telemetry pipeline ingesting WiFi and LoRa cattle collar data, processing it through Kinesis and Lambda, and serving spatial analytics to farmers via ECS and Athena.

nodes.name: Cattle Collar Devices
nodes.notes: Solar-powered, GPS-enabled collars sending telemetry over WiFi or LoRa.

nodes.name: IoT Core
nodes.notes: Ingests high-throughput collar data over WiFi using MQTT.

nodes.name: LoRa Base Station Server
nodes.notes: EC2 instance running third-party software to handle LoRa base station traffic.

nodes.name: Raw Kinesis Stream
nodes.notes: Aggregates duplicate, binary formatted telemetry from both ingestion paths.

nodes.name: Deduplication & Decoding Lambda
nodes.notes: Decodes binary payloads to JSON and removes duplicate telemetry entries.

nodes.name: Processed Kinesis Stream
nodes.notes: Main processed JSON stream consumed by multiple downstream services.

nodes.name: Kinesis Analytics
nodes.notes: Runs Apache Flink to aggregate location data and add geo-indices.

nodes.name: S3 Data Lake
nodes.notes: Stores partitioned location data using farm ID and date as keys.

nodes.name: Athena
nodes.notes: Queries historical location data in S3 to perform MapReduce aggregations.

nodes.name: ECS Fargate
nodes.notes: Backend API service that orchestrates query initiation and fetches results.

nodes.name: Farmer Mobile App
nodes.notes: End-user interface used by farmers to view cow location heatmaps.

edges.notes: Collar transmits data via WiFi MQTT
Collar transmits data over long-range LoRa
Saves aggregated records to S3 partition
ECS Fargate triggers Athena MapReduce query
ECS Fargate retrieves final results from S3
